cases.prompt: 배포 설정 좀 잡아줘, land-and-deploy 쓰게

assertions.text: Detects the deploy platform (Fly.io/Render/Vercel/Netlify/Heroku/GitHub Actions/custom), production URL, and health-check endpoint.
Writes the deployment configuration to CLAUDE.md so future deploys are automatic.

cases.prompt: Set up land-and-deploy config for this repo.

assertions.text: Captures deploy status commands and health-check endpoints for /land-and-deploy.
Persists the detected settings so subsequent deploys require no reconfiguration.
